notes: Using the guides mentioned else where the game runs fine. But, even if I disable Esync I get seams between the sprite tiles of characters that make it hard to look at.
title: UnderRail

notes: Need to install dotnet452 only in this proton version as it comes with wine-mono. (Download protontricks and use protontricks 250520 dotnet452 in terminal). Previous versions required installing XNA too. This had issues with me though as I'd get white seams between sprites. Now it works fine though.
title: UnderRail

notes: I tried following the winetricks/protontricks based fixes listed here on ProtonDB but without success.  The winetricks/protontricks would fail to alter the prefix (would detect a more recent version of dotnet).  The problem was using the 4.2-4 prefix (my current default).  After manually setting to 3.16-4 I was able to launch the protontricks ("protontricks 250520 dotnet452" and "protontricks 250520 xna40") and they'd correctly alter the prefix and thereafter the game would launch.  Unfortunately there were some line artifacts appearing once inside the game engine but this was remedied by disabling Steam Overlay and restarting.  Lastly the game does not exit cleanly and it is necessary to manually end/kill the underrail.exe process after quitting.
title: UnderRail

notes: The workaround described in other reports indeed works very well. I'd recommend disabling Steam Overlay, trying to take a screenshot with it crashed the game for me.
title: UnderRail

notes: With the newest proton-tkg it runs fine for me without any tricks. I initially had some stuttering, but it went away and sometimes the process doesn't seem to close properly, but it can as well be something wrong in my system's configuration.

notes:
Initially had issue described by other users where game would black screen upon saving. I was able to fix this by running "protontricks 250520 xna40" at the terminal. 

The game will not stop running when you exit, so you need to manually kill underrail.exe. Otherwise it seems to be running fine after this fix.
